title: clinopodium alpinum subsp. alpinum
intro: Clinopodium alpinum subsp. alpinum, also known as alpine calamintha or mountain melissa, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium alpinum subsp. alpinum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Clinopodium alpinum subsp. alpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
